blended.narrative: Snowshoe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 59°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
